message:
fix(gateway): handle edge cases in truncation and path traversal

notification.service.ts:
- Fix truncateText to handle Unicode grapheme clusters properly
- Use Array.from() for correct character splitting instead of string indexing
- Handle maxLength <= 0 edge case (return empty string)

pipeline.service.ts:
- Fix null check bug in setValueByPath and deleteValueByPath
- typeof null === "object" in JavaScript, so explicit null check needed
- Prevents TypeError when path contains null intermediate values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
